description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CTest (Windows) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should run on a Windows 2022 environment with a 20-minute timeout. It should use a matrix strategy to build and test with different tool versions, build types, and architectures. The workflow should check out the repository, clone a test repository, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure and build with CMake, run tests, clean up, and build again with DLL configuration.
